normalizeProjectPath lowercases the entire path on Windows before hashing, but non-Windows case-sensitive filesystems hash raw â€” a user who renames /home/alice/Project â†’ /home/alice/project (case-only rename on macOS HFS+/APFS) gets a different project key and loses account context
